description: Validates that promoted devops-engineer subagent correctly loads its SKILL.md and returns content from it. Tests the agent-as-wrapper pattern: wrapper (19 lines) points to ds-domains:devops skill, skill content loads correctly.
input_prompt: use devops-engineer to explain how to set up OIDC federation between GitHub Actions and AWS
notes: Claude invokes the devops-engineer subagent which loads SKILL.md from ds-domains:devops skill. Response includes the OIDC federation pattern: short-lived tokens via GitHub OIDC provider, no static credentials, aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials v4+ mentioned.
